datasets.displayName: Aggregate Facility Revenue and Mileage Summary

datasets.name: 4efe6f57
queryLines: SELECT d.first_name, SUM(m.total_revenue) AS total_revenue FROM datawerhouse1.gold.driver_monthly_metrics m JOIN datawerhouse1.gold.drivers d ON m.driver_id = d.driver_id GROUP BY d.first_name

datasets.name: 64c3844f
queryLines: SELECT d.home_terminal, SUM(f.total_cost) AS total_fuel_cost FROM datawerhouse1.gold.drivers d JOIN datawerhouse1.gold.fuel_purchases f ON d.driver_id = f.driver_id GROUP BY d.home_terminal

datasets.name: 87a9567d
queryLines: SELECT d.first_name, AVG(m.average_idle_hours) AS avg_idle_hours FROM datawerhouse1.gold.driver_monthly_metrics m JOIN datawerhouse1.gold.drivers d ON m.driver_id = d.driver_id GROUP BY d.first_name
